sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9683" key="a)ntepikhru/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπι-κηρύσσω</orth>, <sense id="n9683.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put a price on</tr_> one's <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">head in return,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χρήματά τινι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.93</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
